task_completion.visual_evidence: Text or tables mentioning CCP-1 through CCP-5, along with specific critical limits like 165°F, 135°F, and 41°F.

task_completion.description: The document includes the correct company information and appears to be a substantial, multi-page document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text mentions 'Harborview Culinary Group, LLC' and 'Elena Marchetti'. The scrollbar size or page count in the status bar indicates a document of substantial length (multiple pages).

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with OpenOffice Writer menus, dialogs (like Insert Table or Indexes and Tables), and formatting toolbars, rather than just running a script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The document is properly formatted and not just a raw text dump.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document uses actual heading styles, tables, and structured text, rather than just pasting raw JSON data directly into the page.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents appears to be auto-generated using OpenOffice features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC has the typical appearance of an OpenOffice generated index (often with a grey field shading), rather than being manually typed out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Company: Harborview Culinary Group, LLC. Location: 2100 Whetstone Way, Suite B, Baltimore, MD 21230. Size: 6,800 sq ft. Food Safety Director: Elena Marchetti. 5 CCPs required: CCP-1 Receiving (≤41°F), CCP-2 Cooking (≥165°F for poultry), CCP-3 Cooling (135°F to 70°F in 2h, then to 41°F in 4h), CCP-4 Hot Holding (≥135°F), and CCP-5 Cold Transport (≤41°F). The document must be saved as Harborview_HACCP_Plan_2024.odt.
